implementer.scope: Binance public API field verification and public market contract freeze

rationale: The approved PRD and initial direction synthesis already cover Phase 1 public market discovery.
This stage restarts implementation with a narrower contract-first task after user approval.

diff_fingerprint_note: Review uses the committed subject range recorded in this file, not the moving symbolic HEAD. status.json is excluded from the hash because it stores the fingerprint. Reviewer reproduces with: git diff --binary <base_sha>..<head_sha> -- . ':(exclude)reports/agent-runs/2026-07-public-market-contract-v2/status.json' | shasum -a 256.

commands: curl no-key auth checks for all six endpoints (see 60-test-output.txt)

backend_contract_owner.scope: Binance public API field verification, backend contract, backend implementation

frontend_owner.scope: Frontend UI and integration against frozen backend contract

excluded_for_core_work.reason: Archived Grok implementation is not trusted as active base for this phase.

required_mitigation: Reviewers must recompute diff_fingerprint from base_sha and raw git diff instead of trusting controller summaries.
60-test-output.txt must contain replayable raw command output or an explicit skipped-test reason.
Review prompts must pass raw artifact paths and raw diff paths, not controller paraphrases.

verified_findings.margin_conclusion: Phase 1 does not use /sapi/v1/margin/allPairs or isolated/allPairs; margin_public.source stays 'unverified'; MARGIN_SPOT_CANDIDATE uses only public spot isMarginTradingAllowed.
verified_findings.last_funding_rate_semantics: ambiguous (documented as most recently updated funding rate; settled-vs-estimate not proven)
verified_findings.next_funding_time_semantics: clear (ms epoch of next funding settlement)
verified_findings.bstock_rule: contractType == TRADIFI_PERPETUAL -> asset_tag = BSTOCK (118 observed); asset_tag independent of route_class

review_1.unavailable_policy: If Grok Build produces no schema-valid verdict or the CLI process is still running after 900 seconds, mark review-1 model_unavailable and route to human_escalation_required.

review_2.fallback_reason: anti_self_review_ineligible: stage designer is codex, so codex cannot serve as final review-2 for this stage.
review_2.availability_note: If Claude is quota-exhausted or unavailable, the stage routes to decision_models_exhausted because codex is designer-ineligible and no third final reviewer is registered.
